utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes five items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items. Each item is fully specified: health_coverage includes both physical and mental health insurance with costs; property_coverage includes home/contents insurance with costs; travel_coverage includes travel insurance with costs; additional_services includes a specified service with cost; and total_budget provides a complete monthly and annual breakdown. Therefore, all five required items are present and detailed.
